title: White-Grey-HUD
description: A Resource Pack that makes your HUD Grey and White
body:
This resourcepack will change the color of your HUD to a nice Grey-White look. For everyone who uses Optifine, the color of the levels should be white too (you can also use this pack without Optifine). What textures were changed:
-Air bubbles
-Air bursting
-Hardcore Hearts
-Normal Hearts
-Container Hearts(basically empty hearts)
-All Blinking hearts(When you take damage or regenerate they shortly appear)
-Food
-Armor
-Experience bar
-Jump bar(the bar that appears when you ride a horse)
-Hotbar
-Offhand(left and right)
-Hotbar selection



![This image shows you How the HUD looks when the Hearts, Armor Bar and the food is not full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38682e36567051c2b7a4f7e94015a59603ee2b90.png)
![Here you can see everything filled and the air bubbles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c106a85a558b0c41e4cf74f4e3f81c86ce174763.png)

How to Use?

Step 1: Download the pack from modrinth

Step 2: Open Minecraft and open Resource packs in the Options

Step 3: Drag and drop the File there

Step 4: Enjoy your new green HUD!

(Because there is only one specific version of minecraft in the packmc file it will probably inform you that this pack was made for an other version, but that is no problem beacause it should work in every minecraft version)
